hero.role.label: FULLSTACK DEVELOPER
hero.bio: A fullstack developer from Bandung, Indonesia. I always give the best effort for each project and deliver creative solutions through clean, modern web & mobile apps.

about.label: Who I Am
about.title: About Me
about.bio1: I'm a passionate Fullstack Developer from Bandung with hands-on experience building modern, responsive, and user-focused web applications. I enjoy turning ideas into clean, functional, and scalable digital products that provide smooth and intuitive user experiences.
about.bio2: My main stack includes <react>React.js</react>, <next>Next.js</next>, <flutter>Flutter</flutter>, TypeScript, Go, and Tailwind CSS. I'm particularly interested in creating interfaces that are not only visually appealing, but also fast, accessible, and easy to use.
about.bio3: Beyond coding, I'm currently learning Machine Learning and exploring how intelligent systems can be applied to solve real-world problems. I also enjoy building personal projects, experimenting with new technologies, and continuously improving my skills to grow as a developer in the ever-evolving tech industry.

projects.subtitle: Some projects I've worked on
projects.label: What I've Built
projects.page.description: A collection of personal and collaborative projects I've built — from web apps to mobile apps.
projects.taskschedule.description: A collaborative task and schedule management app for students, featuring workspaces, assignments, and member management.
projects.taskschedule.detail: A collaborative task and schedule management app for students, featuring workspaces, assignments, and member management.
projects.banibaizabeh.description: An e-commerce web app for Indonesian snacks, featuring product listings, cart, and a clean shopping experience.
projects.banibaizabeh.detail: An e-commerce web app for Indonesian snacks, featuring product listings, cart, and a clean shopping experience.
projects.inventorywarehouse.description: A warehouse inventory system for tracking goods movement between warehouses, with a full audit trail of who performed each transfer or stock action.
projects.inventorywarehouse.detail: A warehouse inventory system for tracking goods movement between warehouses, with a full audit trail of who performed each transfer or stock action.
projects.aladdin.description: An e-commerce web app for a Muslim lifestyle brand, offering a curated selection of prayer essentials, apparel, and accessories with a clean and modern shopping experience.
projects.aladdin.detail: An e-commerce web app for a Muslim lifestyle brand, offering a curated selection of prayer essentials, apparel, and accessories with a clean and modern shopping experience.
projects.findcommunity.description: A financial literacy platform that connects users with communities, resources, and tools to learn and grow their understanding of personal finance.
projects.findcommunity.detail: A financial literacy platform that connects users with communities, resources, and tools to learn and grow their understanding of personal finance.
projects.claimdesk.description: An expense claim and reimbursement approval app for managing employee claims from submission to payment.
projects.claimdesk.detail: ClaimDesk is an expense claim / reimbursement approval app for managing employee cost claims. Employees can create and submit claims, Managers can approve, request revision, or reject them, Finance can review and mark claims as paid, and Admins manage master data, audit logs, reports, dashboards, notifications, receipt attachments, and claim comments.
projects.spacebook.description: A coworking space booking app for checking availability, creating bookings, invoices, and payment simulations.
projects.spacebook.detail: Spacebook is a coworking space booking app. Customers can browse workspaces, check availability, create bookings, view invoices, and simulate payments. Admin or staff users can manage spaces, availability rules, blocked slots, booking status, and payment monitoring.
projects.flowforge.description: A project delivery and task management app for PM, internal team, and client collaboration.
projects.flowforge.detail: FlowForge is a project delivery / task management app for collaboration between PMs, internal teams, and clients. It manages tasks by role, project membership, task dependencies, workflow status, optimistic locking, soft delete, audit trail, attachments, and daily standup summaries.
projects.fitajet.description: Mobile app for tracking fitness activities, workouts, and nutrition in real-time.
projects.pasifikan.description: SaaS platform for Australia, New Zealand, and South Asia with premium features.
projects.indosweet.description: B2B e-commerce platform for Indonesian SMEs that simplifies the sugar trading process.
projects.bornapcooks.description: Recipe recording app for capturing family cooking moments with rich features.

experience.page.description: My professional journey as a fullstack developer — companies, roles, and key achievements.
experience.exp1.bullet1: Developed a multi-tenant SaaS application. Enabling scalable and efficient management for multiple clients within a single platform.
experience.exp1.bullet2: Implemented a microservices architecture to improve scalability, maintainability, and system reliability across backend services.
experience.exp1.bullet3: Integrated secure payment gateway systems to support reliable online transactions within the application.
experience.exp1.bullet4: Built and maintained both frontend and backend features, ensuring seamless integration between services and user interfaces.
experience.exp1.bullet5: Maintained clean, consistent, and highly readable code by applying best practices, coding standards, and collaborative development workflows.
experience.exp2.bullet1: Contributed to the development of the company's landing page using modern frontend technologies.
experience.exp2.bullet2: Responsible for the process from design to implementation of the user interface.
experience.exp2.bullet3: Ensured the website was fully responsive and provided a seamless user experience across devices.
